response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to distributed systems and metrics-heavy environments, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at scale — key requirements for the role. His Google and Meta roles are promising but described too vaguely to confirm relevant ownership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, C++, and Python
Proven track record in open-source tooling and infrastructure development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to work in high-scale environments (Meta, Google, Dunnhumby) with real-time data systems
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Resume lacks specifics on telemetry, statistical analysis, or risk controls in experimentation systems
Current Google role starts in 2025 (future-dated), raising questions about accuracy or placeholder content
